ham.subject: Important Update: Company Leave Policy Enhancements Effective 1st June
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you sabhi theek ho. As part of our continuous effort to improve employee welfare, we are pleased to announce updates to the Company Leave Policy effective from 1st June 2024.

Key changes:
- Annual paid leave barha ke 15 din.
- Flexible casual leave for personal emergencies.
- Updated procedure for applying via internal portal.

Kripya attached policy document ko dekhein aur agar koi sawal ho toh HR se sampark karein.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Human Resources
XYZ Ltd.

spam.subject: Urgent: Final Confirmation Needed for Your Merit Scholarship – 24 Hours Deadline
spam.body:
Dear [Student Name],

We hope you are doing well. This is a formal notice from the Office of the Registrar at ABC University regarding the Merit Scholarship you have been awarded for the upcoming academic year.

Due to recent security updates, we need to verify your personal details to confirm the scholarship disbursement. Please provide your student
